children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The co-chairpersons of the Task Force may establish working groups as necessary to meet the goals and carry out the duties of the Task Force.

children.heading: Requests from members
children.label: b Requests from members
children.text: The members of the Task Force may request that the co-chairpersons establish a working group under subsection (a).

children.heading: Participation by nongovernmental organizations
children.label: c Participation by nongovernmental organizations
children.text: The co-chairpersons may allow nongovernmental organizations as appropriate, including academic institutions, conservation groups, and commercial and recreational fishing associations, to participate in a working group established under subsection (a).

children.heading: Nonapplicability of Federal Advisory Committee Act
children.label: d Nonapplicability of Federal Advisory Committee Act
children.text: The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.) shall not apply to working groups established under this section.1See References in Text note below.1
